alertDescription: Because you changed your pay schedule, you'll need to run some transition payrolls. Transition payrolls let you pay employees for any workdays during gaps between pay schedules. You may choose to skip them, but it is your responsibility to ensure employees are paid properly.

skipDialog.title: Skip {{dateRange}} transition payroll?
skipDialog.body: Skipping this payroll means employees will not be paid for the transition period. It is your responsibility to ensure employees are paid properly.
